## Architecture (LoadBearing)

reference = a source-level type reference. Expand any rule ID with `loadbearing explain <rule-id>`.

### Rules
- `layering/core-no-roslyn` — Types in project `Zphil.LoadBearing` must not reference types in project `Zphil.LoadBearing.Roslyn`. Core is the netstandard2.0 reified model both render targets consume; Roslyn extraction is host machinery.
